name: White Chip Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, granulated sugar, brown sugar, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine the margarine, egg white, and white chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded tablespoons of the cookie dough onto an unprepared baking sheet.
5. Bake for 12 minutes or until the edges are light brown.
